description_long: This obelisk is a tall, slender, four-sided monument with a pointed tip, rendered in a matte black material. Its surface is smooth and unadorned except for a single face that features a bold, red inscription in a stylized, possibly futuristic script. The structure tapers gently towards both the top and bottom, giving it a geometric, faceted appearance. The base is simple and angular, seamlessly integrated with the shaft, and lacks any visible steps or decorative plinth. The tip is sharply faceted, forming a clean, pyramidal point. There are no visible decorative motifs, reliefs, or surrounding features, emphasizing its minimalist and modern aesthetic.
description: A tall, matte black obelisk with a pointed tip and a red stylized inscription on one face, featuring a smooth, faceted surface and minimalist design.
description_view_0: The obelisk is seen from an angle, showing its faceted black surface and a partial view of the red inscription.
description_view_1: This view highlights the face with the full red inscription, making the text the most prominent feature.
description_view_2: The obelisk is shown from a side where no inscription is visible, emphasizing its plain, faceted black surface.
description_view_3: A rear or alternate side view, showing only the smooth, matte black surface with no visible markings or inscriptions.
attribute_inscription: A red, stylized inscription is present on one face, written in a futuristic script. The text is bold, vertically oriented, and highly visible against the black surface.
attribute_base_design: The base is angular and seamlessly integrated with the shaft, with no visible steps, platforms, or decorative features. It maintains the same matte black finish as the rest of the obelisk.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is sharply faceted, forming a clean, pyramidal point with no additional decoration or embellishment.
